title: Security: pdfium - write past end of heap buffer when parsing invalid JPEG2000 image
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
A PDF file containing a malformed JPEG2000 image causes opj_pi_next_cprl and opj_pi_next_lrcp in pdfium's bundled openjpeg to write past the end of a heap buffer. More specifically, an attacker can rewrite a 16-bit integer at some location past the end of the buffer from
